case_title: WATKINS, KAREN M. VS KORSUNSKY TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO MORDKO KORSUNSKY
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $794.33 FILED BY KORSUNSKY TRUST KORSUNSKY, MORDKO KORSUNSKY, TANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WATKINS, KAREN M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT HRG TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATKINS, KAREN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KORSUNSKY TRUST KORSUNSKY, MORDKO KORSUNSKY, TANA $23.55 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $188.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $728.33 FILED BY WATKINS, KAREN M. AS TO DEFENDANT KORSUNSKY TRUST KORSUNSKY, MORDKO KORSUNSKY, TANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
POS FOR SUBPOENA DUCES-TECUM ISSUED TO: MORDKO KORSUNSKY FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF WATKINS, KAREN M.
REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT. REQUEST DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KORSUNSKY TRUST KORSUNSKY, MORDKO KORSUNSKY, TANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WATKINS, KAREN M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KORSUNSKY TRUST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KORSUNSKY, TANA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-23-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-27-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED MARCH 27, 2006 AT 6:30 PM. $10 FEE PAID.
